name: Affordable Passenger
recent_news: No public news, M&A, or web presence found as of 2026; appears to be a micro NEMT/passenger transport operator at 1535 S Memorial Dr Ste 120, Tulsa, OK.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. Sub-scale (~3 employees, ~$208K rev), no evidence of yellow school-bus or district contracts; reads as NEMT/paratransit micro-operator.

name: Always Quality Transportation
recent_news: No public news found; likely the same operating entity or a sibling of 'Always Quality TRNSP LLC' in Milwaukee (Ryan Lowe). Differs only by one phone digit (414-397-3206 vs 2306).
fit_notes: Not a fit. Micro-operator, likely duplicate listing of Always Quality TRNSP LLC. Too small for tuck-in; no school-district contract evidence.

name: Always Quality TRNSP LLC
recent_news: No M&A or growth news found; appears as a small Milwaukee-area special-needs/NEMT transport LLC with PO Box address.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit. ~3 employees / ~$207K rev, PO-box only; no district yellow-bus contracts evident. Too small to move the needle as a tuck-in.

name: A-1 Medi Mobile
recent_news: Owner-posted notice indicates the business closed ('WITH A HEAVY HEART, WE HAD TO CLOSE OUR DOORS'); appears no longer operating as of recent listings.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Defunct/closed micro NEMT operator in Green Bay; not a school-bus contractor and no operating assets to acquire.

name: Sun Up Limousine
recent_news: D&B classifies Sun Up Limousin (Kiowa, OK) under Farm Product Raw Material Merchant Wholesalers, not passenger transport; suggests the name is misleading and this is not a passenger/school transport operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Likely mis-classified - D&B has it as a farm-product wholesaler, not a school bus / student transport contractor. Skip.
